plugins.name: readme
plugins.description: Use when writing or generating a README from scratch for a software project.

plugins.name: kryptonite
plugins.description: Skills for Claude Code agent teams: TDD, debugging, planning, and team coordination workflows. Claude Code only — depends on TeamCreate, SendMessage, Agent.team_name, TaskOutput, and TaskStop.

plugins.name: refine-jakes-resume

plugins.name: x
plugins.description: X (Twitter) API access via the hosted X MCP server — search posts, look up users, bookmarks, trends, and news — plus X's official API skill.

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: Convene a council of AI coding agents — each adds its own candid perspective on a project or spec/plan to COUNCIL.md.
